title: AI ki Duniya
excerpt: AI ki duniya mein naye terms aur slang ka bohot zyada use ho raha hai. Is article mein hum aapko LLMs se lekar hallucinations tak ki basic baatein samjhayenge. Bhartiya tech enthusiasts ke liye yeh guide bahut upyogi hai.
content:
AI ki duniya mein aapne kabhi na kabhi Large Language Models (LLMs) ki baat suni hogi. Lekin kya aapko pata hai ki LLMs hota kya hai? Yeh ek tarah ki AI model hai jo badi matra mein data ko process karke humari tarah se baat kar sakti hai. Ab hallucinations ki baat karein, to yeh ek aisa term hai jo tab use hota hai jab AI model galat information provide karta hai. 

 AI ki duniya mein aapko aur bhi bohot saare terms milenge, jaise ki Natural Language Processing (NLP), Computer Vision, aur Machine Learning. NLP ki madad se AI model humari baaton ko samajh sakte hain, jabki Computer Vision ki madad se AI model images aur videos ko analyze kar sakte hain. Machine Learning ki madad se AI model apne aap ko improve kar sakte hain. 

 Bharteey peshewar aur students ke liye yeh terms samajhna bohot zaroori hai, kyunki AI ki duniya mein career banana chahte hain. Isliye, humne socha ki AI ki basic baatein samjhana zaroori hai. Is article mein humne aapko AI ki duniya ki kuch important terms ki definition batayi hai. 

 AI ki duniya mein bhag lene ke liye aapko is tarah ki baatein samajhni zaroori hain. To agle baar jab aap kisi se AI ki baat karenge, to aap unhein confidently samjhane mein saksham honge ki LLMs, hallucinations, aur NLP hota kya hai.
